name: AllClaimPlotCommand
author: supercrafter333
description: With this plugin you can instantly automatically give a plot to all online players on your server! This plugin only works with the plugin MyPlot by jasonwhynn10 !
readme_markdown: # AllClaimPlotCommand [![](https://poggit.pmmp.io/shield.state/AllClaimPlotCommand)](https://poggit.pmmp.io/p/AllClaimPlotCommand) [![](https://poggit.pmmp.io/shield.dl.total/AllClaimPlotCommand)](https://poggit.pmmp.io/p/AllClaimPlotCommand) With this plugin you can instantly automatically give a plot to all online players on your server! This plugin only works with the plugin MyPlot by jasonwhynn10! ### Commands + Permissions ``/allclaimplot | allclaimplotcommand.allclaimplot.cmd`` Bypass permission: ``allclaimplot.admin`` ### License This plugin is Licensed by supercrafter333 with the [Apache 2.0 License](/LICENSE)! The owner and developer of this plugin is supercrafter333, idea by DerEchteBuilder! ### Downloads Poggit: AllClaimPlotCommand
